ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxpayers" (
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxpayer */,
  "taxpayer_number" TEXT /* Taxpayer's unique number (e.g., EIN) */,
  "taxpayer_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxpayer entity */,
  "taxpayer_address" TEXT /* Taxpayer's address */,
  "taxpayer_city" TEXT /* City of the taxpayer */,
  "taxpayer_state" TEXT /* State of the taxpayer */,
  "taxpayer_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the taxpayer */,
  "taxpayer_organizational_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., LLC, Corporation) */,
  "taxpayer_organizational_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizational entity */,
  "record_type_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of record */,
  "sos_charter_date" TEXT /* Date of charter registration with the Secretary of State */,
  "sos_status_date" TEXT /* Date of status last updated */,
  "responsibility_beginning_date" TEXT /* Date when the taxpayer's responsibilities began */,
  "taxpayer_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number */,
  "taxpayer_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email */,
  "taxpayer_website" TEXT /* Taxpayer's website (if applicable) */,
  "taxpayer_fax" TEXT /* Taxpayer's fax number */,
  "taxpayer_status" TEXT /* Current status of the taxpayer (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the record entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxpayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxpayers_taxpayer_organizational_type FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_organizational_type") REFERENCES organizational_types ("type_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxpayers_record_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("record_type_code") REFERENCES record_types ("record_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizational_types" (
  "organizational_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizational type */,
  "type_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of organization (e.g., CL for LLC) */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizational type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organizational type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the organizational type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizational_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_types" (
  "record_type_code" TEXT /* Code of the record type */,
  "record_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the record type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the record type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated taxpayer */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance status was last checked */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next date when compliance needs to be reviewed or renewed */,
  "compliance_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of compliance requirement */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the compliance status */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compliance status was last reviewed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_compliance_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_type_id") REFERENCES compliance_types ("compliance_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responsibilities" (
  "responsibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each responsibility record */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated taxpayer */,
  "responsibility_type" TEXT /* Type of responsibility (e.g., tax filing, payment) */,
  "begin_date" TEXT /* Date when the responsibility begins */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the responsibility ends (if applicable) */,
  "responsibility_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the responsibility */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the responsibility (e.g., pending, completed, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("responsibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responsibilities_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxpayer_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated taxpayer */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., compliance reminder, responsibility alert) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the taxpayer */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxpayer_notifications_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated taxpayer */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, auditor, tax officer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the record */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxpayer record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the record was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken during access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the task is assigned */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for task completion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxpayer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated taxpayer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the review */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the review */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was conducted */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is currently active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxpayer_reviews_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxpayer_reviews_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_types" (
  "compliance_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance requirement */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compliance type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance document */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated taxpayer */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., tax return, payment receipt) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_documents_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)
